creator: mikael@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 174739
kodi sysutils/hal armv7

New patch:
 - I've resurrected the HAL code (sysutils/hal), it gives us a working shutdown/reboot buttons and automounting of usb drive.
 - it builds for cortex-a7 and neon is enabled for ffmpeg

build log:
http://mikael.urankar.free.fr/FreeBSD/arm/build_logs/kodi-16.1.log
